blockingIssues.description: Trait method signatures are recorded using only explicit parameter types and return type; `sig_self` / `fn_self` is discarded. Later impl validation compares only parameter count/types and return type, so a trait requiring `fn touch(&mut self)` is incorrectly satisfied by `impl Trait for T { fn touch(&self) { ... } }` (and vice versa). This violates the trait contract and will allow non-mutating receivers to pass typecheck where mutation capability is required.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that `.factory/services.yaml` is resolved relative to the repo root/working tree, not the mission home directory, so validators and reviewers do not attempt nonexistent absolute paths outside the repository.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Attempting to read `/home/lenstr/.factory/services.yaml` returned ENOENT during review, while the repo clearly contains `.factory/library/*` under `/home/lenstr/workspace/personal/hack/rgo-lang/.factory/`.
